findings.description: Section s3 has an empty title and content 'なし' (3 characters, well below the 50-character threshold). The corresponding source element is a standalone `++++++++++++++++` line which is an RST horizontal-rule separator, not an actual section with content. This section should not exist as a distinct knowledge section.
findings.source_evidence: The `++++++++++++++++` line between the intro and 基本構造 in the source is a decorative separator without a title or body text — it defines no section content.

findings.description: The hints for s6 include 'DbConnectionManagementHandler' and 'TransactionManagementHandler' but are missing the distinct _main-suffixed variants 'DbConnectionManagementHandler_main' and 'TransactionManagementHandler_main', which appear explicitly as separate handler names in the HandlerQueue and all four processing flows in the source.
findings.source_evidence: HandlerQueue and flows reference both 'DbConnectionManagementHandler_main' and 'DbConnectionManagementHandler' (and 'TransactionManagementHandler_main') as distinct, separately named handlers throughout the JavaScript flow definitions.
